title: aciphylla aromatica
intro: Aciphylla aromatica, also known as New Zealand angelica or parsnip parsley, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Aciphylla aromatica include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
